name: NumericInputStepper
description: Increment/decrement buttons for numeric inputs with min/max constraints and step control.
usage_guidelines: Use alongside numeric inputs for precise value adjustment.
Set min/max to constrain value range.
Typically positioned on the right side of input.

styling_info.visual_description: Two stacked buttons (up/down arrows) with border. Buttons disable at min/max limits. Hover effects on enabled buttons.

Basic.title: Basic

WithConstraints.title: With Constraints
